mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TOSS (user_id, payment_key, order_id, amount, status, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{paymentKey}, #{orderId}, #{amount}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, payment_key, order_id, amount, status, created_at FROM TOSS WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE TOSS SET status = #{status} WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
